metadata.title: PromptFlow - Professional AI Prompt Manager | One-Click Prompt Library
metadata.description: PromptFlow is your professional AI prompt management tool. Press ⌘K on any AI platform like ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek to instantly access your saved prompts. Smart organization & cross-platform support.

hero.badge: Supports ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek & 10+ AI platforms
hero.title: Professional AI Prompt Manager
hero.subtitle: One-Click Access · Smart Organization · Cross-Platform
hero.description: Press ⌘K on any AI page to instantly summon your prompt library. Supports ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, Kimi and more. Make every AI conversation efficient and precise.

quickAccess.title: ⌘K Quick Access
quickAccess.description: Press ⌘K on any AI page to instantly open the prompt panel. No tab switching needed, inspiration at your fingertips.

smartOrg.title: Smart Organization
smartOrg.description: Tags + folders dual-dimension management with full-text search. Locate any prompt in seconds, no matter how large your library.

crossPlatform.title: Cross-Platform Support
crossPlatform.description: Perfectly compatible with ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, Kimi, Gemini and 10+ major AI platforms.

community.title: Community Picks
community.subtitle: Discover high-quality prompts from the community, import with one click to your library
community.installPrompt: Please install the PromptFlow extension to use this feature

useCases.title: Who It's For
useCases.subtitle: Whether you're a creator, developer, or operator, PromptFlow boosts your AI productivity

creator.title: Content Creators
creator.description: Manage copy templates, headline formulas, content frameworks. Let AI accelerate your creative process.

developer.title: Developers
developer.description: Save code snippets, refactoring instructions, Code Review templates. Boost coding efficiency 10x.

operator.title: Operators
operator.description: Store data analysis prompts, report templates, user insight frameworks. Drive decisions with data.

cta.title: Start Free Today
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users boosting their AI workflow efficiency

metadata.title: Community Prompts | PromptFlow
metadata.description: Discover the best AI prompts shared by the community. Covering writing, coding, image generation and more. One-click import to your PromptFlow library.
